sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59965" key="kriqolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑθο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n59965.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gathering barley</tr_>: among the Opuntii, a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">magistrate who kept the barley for sacrifices</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.292c</biblScope> </bibl>: —hence<orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρῑθο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cod.Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.26.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
